name: unpin_item_from_channel
description: Unpins a message, identified by its timestamp, from a specified channel if the message is currently pinned there; this operation is destructive.

channel.description:
The ID of the channel where the message is pinned (e.g., a public channel, private channel, or direct message).
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "G0987654321"

timestamp.description:
Timestamp of the message to unpin. This is required to identify the specific message to be removed from the channel's pinned items.
Examples:
  "1625640000.000100"
  "1700000000.123456"
